disambiguated.context: My neighbor, who has bipolar disorder, and his sister received devastating news about a family member. This trauma was a lot to handle and my neighbor who has bipolar disorder had to calm down his sister to keep them from breaking the coffee table.
disambiguated.question: Who did not react violently?
